final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a canned salmon recipe food photography image for Instagram.

Style/medium: warm food photography, striking colors
Composition:
  split-screen layout
  top half: flat lay of fresh ingredients (canned salmon chunks, lemon wedges, parsley, breadcrumbs)
  bottom half: golden-brown cooked salmon patties
  plain white banner in the center area carrying the title text
Subject: canned salmon recipe visual — ingredients and finished salmon patties
Scene/backdrop: flat lay for top half; plated dish for bottom half
Lighting/mood: warm food photography lighting
Color palette:
Materials/textures:
Text (verbatim): "What is the correct way to eat canned salmon?" in a stylish yet clear and legible handwritten font, readable at a glance; watermark "simmerrecipes.com" at the bottom
Constraints: suitable for Instagram posting
Avoid:
